name: gum acacia
description: Gum acacia is a natural plant-derived polysaccharide used as a stabilizer and thickening agent to improve texture and emulsification in food products.
raw_text: Kmart, Easter Basket: dextrose, maltodextrin, and less than 2% of citric acid, calcium stearate, artificial flavors, blue 1, blue 1 lake, yellow 5., lemonhead: sucrose, corn syrup, citric acid, natural and artificial flavors, acacia (gum arabic), confectioner's glaze, lemon juice concentrate, carnauba wax and yellow 5, white mineral oil (processing aid). | Organic Acacia Gum Powder: Organic Acacia Gum Powder (Acacia senegal/Acacia seyal) | Labels: en:vegetarian, en:organic, en:no-gmos, en:vegan, en:non-gmo-project
